---
title: "dedupe_corrections.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\data\dedupe_corrections.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.83
---

## Intent
The `dedupe_corrections.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
